boundary: Mechanical refinement inventory has all declared targets checked and context_hash plus decode_arc_object verifier-backed proof lanes complete within their stated narrow scopes.

entries.boundary: decode_arc_object has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for bounded malformed parser rejection and deterministic rejection behavior. Full parser equivalence remains outside this narrow proof claim.
entries.obligation: Rust decoder must reject malformed and over-limit ARC objects consistently with Coq encoding safety assumptions.

entries.boundary: encode_arc_object has a mechanical round-trip refinement track and encode/decode surface check; not yet full byte-level semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust encoder must produce canonical ARC object encodings compatible with the Coq encoding model.

entries.boundary: context_hash has verifier-backed Kani proof evidence for all four context transcript model harnesses: determinism, policy-hash binding, epoch binding, and capability-stamp binding.
entries.obligation: Rust context_hash must bind object, rights, policy, authority, and temporal context as modeled in Coq.

entries.boundary: verify has a mechanical verification-gate refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust verify must accept only when capability, revocation, temporal, authority, wrapper, and transparency gates hold.

entries.boundary: open has a mechanical authorization refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust open must refine the Coq master open invariant and reject missing authorization gates.

entries.boundary: seal has a mechanical lifecycle refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust seal must refine the Coq lifecycle seal transition.

entries.boundary: add_epoch_wrapper has a mechanical epoch-wrapper refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust add_epoch_wrapper must refine rewrap and epoch-wrapper state-machine rules.

entries.boundary: rotate_epoch has a mechanical authority-epoch refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust rotate_epoch must strictly advance epoch state.

entries.boundary: rotate_epoch_full has a mechanical full authority-rotation refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust rotate_epoch_full must preserve authority transition and transparency linkage obligations.

entries.boundary: capability_tree has a mechanical Merkle/capability proof refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust capability tree proof logic must refine Coq Merkle membership and revocation models.

entries.boundary: transparency has a mechanical append/lookup/conflict refinement track and source-surface check; not yet full semantic proof.
entries.obligation: Rust transparency append or equivalent log extension logic must refine Coq append-only behavior.
